feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: In the PO under the Conditions tab, the PBXX price cannot be edited for a few POs
entry.content: In the PO under the Conditions tab, the PBXX price cannot be edited for a few POs, even after the GR and Invoice processes are completed

entry.title: User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data.
entry.content:
User is not able to post the depreciation due to missing cost center in Asset master data 30000708 & 30000710.

in C01 /100 system, for company code 3806 Could you check and let us know you advise on this.

we have similar issue in C02/100 as well 30000667

Thank you

entry.title: Depreciation posting not completed due to missing Cost center in Asset Master
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Issue details: User created Asset with out Cost center. And posted acquisition And performed depreciation run Asset got posted depreciation but not in General ledger.

System C01/100, Company cod 3806, Asset No 30000708, COD-MIN

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: VA05 Report getting duplicate entries
entry.content:
Dear Team,

in VA05 Standard report ,We are getting  Duplicate entries.

due to this duplicate entries we are not getting proper report.

Thanks

entry.title: Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages
entry.content: "Report 6PP1-001 does not contain any data pages" while running the S_ALR_87013542 (Project System) report. For the Post Goods Issue posting, we are using movement type 281 Q with the cost center assigned as the account assignment object. Could this issue be related to the report output type, or is there another possible cause?  As requested by the business, could you confirm whether it is possible to display line items at the Cost Center level?

entry.title: SP01 Multiple Selection Adjacent rows not work
entry.content: I ran SP01 and obtained over 10,000 records. I want to select some to delete, but I cannot select multiple adjacent rows.

entry.title: The planned orders are being generated even though the prod order exist
entry.content:
The problem here is that whenever we run MRP for the below material a new planned order is being created regardless of the existing prod order for that sales item when the delivery date is beyond 2028.

 

Kindly find more details reproduce steps in the attached document.

 

Please let us know the route cause for the behavior of material

entry.title: Attachment in PR to flow to PO automatically in ECC
entry.content: Attachment in PR to flow to PO automatically in ECC

entry.title: Condition contract (WCOCO) triggers error "Field KVGR1 of condition table A9DS is not supported"
entry.content: We have created new condition table 9DS in the (V/03) with the standard fields key combination COCO_NUM,KVGR1,KVGR2, KONDM,LAND1,REGIO for the condition type YS01 and for the condition contract type YR01, when we create the condition contract system triggers the error message "Field KVGR1 of condition table A9DS is not supported"

entry.title: Table MSEG Field value of stock type-INSMK update logic
entry.content:
For movement document with movement type 311, we found the field value of INSMK are different, for the same one SKU, value of 1/4/F/Blank all can be found. Please kindly check in which case the value should be 1/4/F/Blank. 

Another question, for field of INSMK, if we search available value by F4, only X/S/2/3/Blank/F can be seen, may I check why value of 1 and 4 also can be found in document lines ?Thanks.

entry.title: MSEG INSMK value updated incorrect
entry.content: Document line with MVT 311 in MSEG, the field value of INSMK are different, for the same one SKU, value 1/4/F/Blank all existed.  May I know in which case the value should be 1/4/F/Blank.

entry.title: WE02 List Specific Segment – How to Display/Export Parent IDoc Number (DOCNUM) as a Column?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am using WE02 and the List Specific Segment function to display all records for a custom detail segment (Z1DCSCONSDET) across multiple IDocs.

My goal is to create a report/export that combines all detail segment records from multiple IDocs into a single Excel file while also identifying which parent IDoc each record came from. Ideally, the output would contain both the segment data and the corresponding IDoc Number (DOCNUM).

The report currently displays the segment fields correctly (Material, Batch, Quantity, Comp.Id, Posting Date, Header Text, etc.), but I do not see an option to add the parent IDoc Number as a column.

When I select a segment row, the status bar at the bottom displays something similar to:

IDoc 000000009300930 Segment 000002

This indicates that SAP knows the parent IDoc associated with each segment record, but I have not found a way to display or export DOCNUM in the output.

My IDoc structure is:

  • Basic Type: ZDCSCONS
  • Header Segment: Z1HDR
  • Detail Segment: Z1DCSCONSDET

Is there a standard way to display or export the parent IDoc Number (DOCNUM) together with the segment data in WE02 List Specific Segment? My end goal is to create a consolidated Excel report of multiple IDoc segments while retaining the corresponding IDoc Number for each record.

Any guidance would be appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: Clarification on Standard Processing of Multiple DELFOR IDocs
entry.content:
The sender system (Infineon) and the receiver system (Bosch) are both SAP systems.

Infineon sends Supplier Confirmations for the same Scheduling Agreement in two separate DELFOR IDocs (one containing Firm schedule lines and another containing Forecast schedule lines) in DELFOR D.97A/D.04A format.

We would like to understand the standard SAP behavior for processing these multiple inbound DELFOR IDocs. Specifically, how should SAP process Supplier Confirmations received in separate IDocs for the same Scheduling Agreement.

entry.title: Duplicate entries in Report VA05
entry.content:
VA05Document Date        25.08.2024      To   27.08.2024All orders

Sales Organization :  00D1
Distribution Channel   : O2
Division            : 02
Sales office      :   D111
Sales Group     :     FDUyou will get Report, and download to Spreadsheet, and filter with Material  " Y1040T3  "you will get same line item number duplicate entry.

entry.title: Error ME179 in a Release Strategy - SAP ERP ECC6
entry.content: To  Adjust threshold from < $500K → < $1M (or NGN equivalent) so there is need to change the threshold in ECC6

entry.title: F110 - To add fields in the AVL
entry.content:
Tcode : F110

To add the below fields in the ALV  for proposal run.

  1. With Holding tax 

      2. Net due date

entry.title: number range issue
entry.content: Va42 in conditions tab is this Std sap limit to 9 digit or can this be increased to more than 10 because, SFDC is sending the value of 10 characters and SAP is throwing error, while trying to enter manually also we are facing this error

entry.title: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N
entry.content: Problem in closing projects in CJ20N

entry.title: Ich möchte parallel ein 8-stelliges, externes Nummernintervall für PPS-Fertigungsaufträge nutzen.
entry.content: Wir nutzen derzeit einen gemeinsamen, 7-stelligen internen Nummernkreis für alle PPS-Fertigungsaufträge (Auftragstyp 10). Da dieser zu Ende geht, möchten wir parallel ein 8-stelliges, externes Nummernintervall für die gleiche Gruppe verwenden, um sowohl das alte interne als auch das neue externe Intervall für alle Auftragsarten nutzen zu können. In CO82 war es uns nicht möglich, diese Konstellation zu erstellen. Wir möchten wissen, ob es grundsätzlich möglich ist, und falls ja, wie wir diese Konstellation einrichten können.
